name: Millman National Land Services
description: Provides professional land surveying across Nebraska including Omaha, Lincoln, Bellevue, Grand Island, and Kearney, specializing in ALTA/NSPS Land Title Surveys for property boundaries, agricultural land, and rural building projects.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: They're friendly, with a can-do, will-do attitude. They're always trying to make sure we're a satisfied customer.
They're available and enthusiastic about the work they do. That is peace of mind for us.
We were thoroughly impressed with Millman during the Burger King transaction and will be sure to keep Millman in mind for future transactions.

sentiment.summary: Millman National Land Services has exceptionally strong sentiment with consistently positive reviews praising their friendly demeanor, can-do attitude, enthusiasm, and reliability, resulting in high customer satisfaction and repeat business.

name: R.W. Engineering & Surveying
description: Offers civil engineering, land surveying, aerial mapping, construction contract administration, 3D machine controlled modeling, and 3D laser scanning; established 1980 with additional office in Lincoln, NE.
